mapper.sql: id, kaifangtime, zhusu, yonghutiwen, xinlv, zhenduan, xiuxijiany, yongyao, xiaoyuanyisheng, xiaoyuanyishengid, xyyiliaoyh, xyyiliaoyhid, xyyiliaopaibanyuyue, xyyiliaopaibanyuyueid, price, state

distinct
from t_guahaozixunjieguo
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_guahaozixunjieguo (id, kaifangtime, zhusu, yonghutiwen, xinlv, zhenduan, xiuxijiany, yongyao, xiaoyuanyisheng, xiaoyuanyishengid, xyyiliaoyh, xyyiliaoyhid, xyyiliaopaibanyuyue, xyyiliaopaibanyuyueid, price, state) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{kaifangtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhusu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yonghutiwen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xinlv,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhenduan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xiuxijiany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yongyao,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xiaoyuanyisheng,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xiaoyuanyishengid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{xyyiliaoyh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xyyiliaoyhid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{xyyiliaopaibanyuyue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xyyiliaopaibanyuyueid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
